3172620.name: Kleptomania
3172620.description:
Please note - This game is in early development!
Anything you see will be subject to change before release, however the core elements of gameplay will remain the same.

The Game
Kleptomania is a third-person heist game based on stealth, parkour, infiltrating and escaping various challenging scenarios. With a focus on freedom of approach you can sneak, disguise, distract, explore and more in order to solve your objectives in multiple ways!

Embark upon your looting journey with a multitude of locations ranging from malls and offices, to banks and police stations.
3172620.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
